positive: A minimalist, kawaii illustration of a steaming cup of matcha latte next to a stack of perfectly drawn pastel croissants. The style must be clean flat vector illustration, simple line work, Japanese aesthetic, pastel color palette (mint green, cream, blush pink), highly symmetrical composition, studio lighting, sticker sheet design, adorable, cheerful, suitable for merchandise, trending on Etsy.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, shadows, complex textures, realism, grunge, messy
